evals.prompt: I have a .NET MAUI app using ZXing.Net.Maui for barcode scanning. I want to replace it with SparkScan. Here is my page: ZxingMauiPage.xaml + ZxingMauiPage.xaml.cs
evals.expected_output: Removes the ZXing.Net.Maui XAML control, namespace, options, and event handler. Replaces with <scandit:SparkScanView> + new SparkScan(settings) + OnAppearing/OnDisappearing forwarding to the SparkScan control. Maps the ZXing formats (Ean13, Code128, QrCode) to Scandit symbologies (Ean13Upca, Code128, Qr). Preserves the ScannedBarcode record and deduplication logic.

assertions.text: ZXing.Net.Maui using directives are NOT present in the new code
<zxing:CameraBarcodeReaderView is NOT present in the updated XAML (may appear in a before/after summary table)
The xmlns:zxing namespace is NOT present in the updated XAML
BarcodeReaderOptions is NOT present in the new code
Scandit.DataCapture using directives ARE present
<scandit:SparkScanView> is present in the updated XAML (not <scandit:DataCaptureView>, which is BarcodeCapture's control)
The xmlns:scandit="clr-namespace:Scandit.DataCapture.Barcode.Spark.UI.Maui;assembly=ScanditBarcodeCaptureMaui" namespace is added (assembly name is ScanditBarcodeCaptureMaui, with no dots)
<scandit:SparkScanView> binds its DataCaptureContext, SparkScan, and SparkScanViewSettings bindable properties
The BarcodeScanned event is wired (sparkScan.BarcodeScanned += ...)
Symbology.Ean13Upca is enabled
Symbology.Code128 is enabled
Symbology.Qr is enabled (not Symbology.QrCode, which does not exist)
Symbology.QrCode does NOT appear as a Symbology enum value (BarcodeFormat.QrCode in a summary table is acceptable)
new SparkScan(settings) is used (not SparkScan.Create or BarcodeCapture.Create)
The page's OnAppearing forwards to this.SparkScanView.OnAppearing()
The page's OnDisappearing forwards to this.SparkScanView.OnDisappearing()
Permissions.RequestAsync<Permissions.Camera>() (or CheckStatusAsync<Permissions.Camera>()) is used
ScannedBarcode record is preserved in output
scannedBarcodes list is preserved in output
Deduplication logic (checking for existing value before adding) is preserved

MauiProgram.cs is updated to call .UseScanditCore().UseScanditBarcode(c => c.AddSparkScanView()) — UseScanditCore takes NO configure lambda, UseScanditBarcode takes a configure lambda with AddSparkScanView() inside
MauiProgram.cs does NOT call .UseScanditCore(c => c.AddDataCaptureView()).UseScanditBarcode() — that is the BarcodeCapture MAUI builder shape, not SparkScan's
A summary of changes is shown with what was removed and what was added
Setup checklist mentions all four NuGet packages (Scandit.DataCapture.Core, Scandit.DataCapture.Core.Maui, Scandit.DataCapture.Barcode, Scandit.DataCapture.Barcode.Maui)
A concrete version number is used for the dependencies (not a [version] placeholder)
Setup checklist mentions NSCameraUsageDescription (for the iOS target)
Setup checklist mentions setting SupportedOSPlatformVersion to 24 (or higher) for the Android target
